assertions.description: When no dashboards are affected by the PR, no screenshot is taken
assertions.evidence: The outputs/ directory contains no files. No screenshots were taken.

assertions.description: The agent explicitly states that no dashboards were affected and no screenshots are needed
assertions.evidence: Agent output stated: 'The file src/sync/orchestrator.ts is a TypeScript source file, not a dashboard JSON file. No dashboard files were modified in this change.'
